package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for package_name_role_drift: Packages whose names advertise one role, such as `service` or `model`, but whose exported symbols primarily belong to another role.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule108NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule108NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule108NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario108Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule108NegativeService, input Rule108NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
